name: Browser Automation
description: AI-powered browser agent that can navigate websites, fill forms, click buttons, and extract information. Use for complex web tasks that require interaction.

capabilities: Navigate to any website and interact with it
Fill out forms and click buttons
Extract structured data from dynamic web pages
outbound_requests: any website you direct it to
data_sent: Your task instructions and any input data
scope.note: Skyvern runs in their cloud. Any credentials or data you provide in task instructions will be processed by their servers.

keys.label: Skyvern API Key
keys.get_key_instructions: Sign up at app.skyvern.com → Settings → API Keys

installer.scope_summary: Controls a browser to interact with websites on your behalf via Skyvern.
